nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘When you enter the land which I am going to give to you and reap its harvest, then you shall bring in the sheaf of the first fruits of your harvest to the priest.

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you come into the land that I give you and reap its harvest, you shall bring the sheaf of the firstfruits of your harvest to the priest,

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人，對他們說：你們到了我賜給你們的地，收割莊稼的時候，要把初熟莊稼的一捆帶到祭司那裡。

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “你们进入耶和华将要赐给你们的那片土地以后，每逢庄稼初熟之时，你们要带一捆初熟的谷物交给祭司。
